To analyze the rental market in Miami, Florida, we first load the dataset using Pandas and calculate the mean, median, and standard deviation of rental prices. * * *  
We then segment the data by property type, such as single-family homes, condos, and apartments, to identify trends within each category. * * *  
Finally, we visualize the findings using Matplotlib to display the distribution of rental prices and highlight any outliers. * * *
